metadata.description: ZenHive Claude Code plugins — orchestration and per-language development tooling, each plugin independently toggleable per repo

plugins.name: harness
plugins.description: Language-agnostic orchestration surface for the harness OTP engine — drive the implement → review → land loop (rmap tasks, verified runs, cross-family grading) from any consuming repo. Skills: harness-driver (API/MCP contract), harness-workflow (the loop). Stale-base guard hook.
